budgets_note: Budgets RATIFIED UNCHANGED at v3-M5 (2026-07-10): one full-length e4_arm_p calibration sequence (seed 37, 6 tasks, glm-5.2 thinking-on, z.ai paas/v4 route direct-zhipu-api-key) observed max 7/27 turns, 178400/490000 tokens, 2/12 verifications, $0.8175/$5 — no wall hit, the freeze rule's fits-with-headroom branch applies. Values remain the v2 v0.3 set (27 turns / 12 verifications / 490000 tokens / $5 cap), read from the frozen v2 file; version 0.1 -> 0.2 marks this ratification event. Model-id pin: these budgets transfer to a v3-M6 evidence run only on the exact model id glm-5.2, thinking-ON, on this route; any other model or thinking configuration repeats the ratification. Provenance: docs/protocols/e4-v3-m5-calibration-manifest-20260710-001.json + docs/protocols/e4-v3-m5-reasoning-observability-20260710-001.json; notes docs/e4/E4V3-M5-BUDGET-CALIBRATION-NOTES.md.
